category_sources: Official Google GitHub README describes Zopfli as a compression library for deflate or zlib compression.
source_facts.description: New zlib (gzip, deflate) compatible compressor.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use Zopfli Compression Algorithm.
docs_sources: Official Google GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes API and build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/google/zopfli; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README says Zopfli supports deflate, gzip, and zlib output formats and is programmed in C.
